##LOCALITY=Tanco mine (Bernic Lake mine), Bernic Lake, Lac-du-Bonnet area, Manitoba, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Royal Ontario Museum

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
